settings.subtitle: One piece. Unknown until it is yours.
settings.description: A hand-made original artwork on paper, completed before you receive it. Its number, its composition, its character — already decided. You don't choose your piece. You receive it. Then you reveal it.
settings.callout_text: Your edition is assigned at random and revealed only after purchase. No two pieces in the collection of 10,000 are identical.
settings.shipping_line_2: No returns — each piece is unique
settings.fact_meta_1: Stamped by hand · No two alike
settings.faq_answer_1: Your IRIS is assigned at random when you purchase. Once you receive the work, scan the NFC tag and activate it to reveal the exact edition in your passport.
settings.faq_answer_2: Each IRIS contains 24K physical gold embedded into the original work. The final gold content is disclosed after activation and also appears in the IRIS passport.
settings.faq_question_3: Can I return or exchange my piece?
settings.faq_answer_3: No. Each IRIS is unique and assigned at random. Because the artwork is sealed to the collector at purchase, all sales are final.
settings.faq_answer_4: Orders are packed securely and shipped with tracking. Delivery timelines may vary by destination, but most orders arrive within 5–10 business days.

settings.heading: What others have received
settings.description: Every activated IRIS enters the visible history of the edition. Browse the works that have already been claimed and revealed.
